svg.text: 2 cards per page · top progress bar = slice cycle within card · outer pair-page dots · auto-slide every 5s · 400ms transition

g.text: T₀ Page 1 / 2 · slice 1 of each card
Both cards just settled. Top bars are about to start filling.
T₀ + 3s Page 1 still · slice 2 inside each card
Each card cycles its own slices on its own timer (independent).
T₀ + 5s Outer carousel slides → page 2 (400ms ease)
Page-pair advances. New cards swing in: [Siswa, RPP Menunggu].
Tap or drag pauses both timers · resumes 3s
Both inner slice cycle and outer page cycle
cardsPerPage: 2 · autoSlideCards: true · autoSlideDuration: const Duration(seconds: 5)
PageView already pages by 2 cards · 400ms transition · Timer.periodic loops with `% totalPages`
Per-card sub-PageView with its own Timer (3s per slice). Bar = N segments where N = slice count.
Active segment fills with an AnimationController (Tween 0→1 over slice dwell time).
/dashboard/full returns metrics[] · each metric has slices[] = [{key, label, value, caption}]
Same shape as parent payload. Admin sends 4 metrics, parent sends per-anak.
Tap pauses auto-slide on that card · long-press = jump to specific filter route
Pair-page tap target → routes to the metric's filtered list (e.g. Kehadiran 7A)
